name: agent-engineering
description: Installable workflow and skill package for coding-agent engineering principles, principle-based reviews, planning workflows, and AI-native engineering practices.

interface.longDescription: Use Agent Engineering to install shared planning, review, brainstorm, PR feedback, and release-oriented workflows backed by principle documents and configurable review presets.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Engineering to install principle-driven review workflows, planning workflows, and shared engineering guidance into this project.
